    structure RDFTriple :
    Type

    URL-Encoded RDFa: ZK Witness + HME in Shareable URL -

    • subject : String

    • object : String

        def urlEncode (s : String) :
        String
        Equations
        • urlEncode s = ((((s.replace " " "%20").replace ":" "%3A").replace "/" "%2F").replace "#" "%23").replace "\"" "%22"

              def tripleToTurtle (t : RDFTriple) :
              String
              Equations
              • tripleToTurtle t = toString t.subject ++ toString " " ++ toString t.predicate ++ toString " " ++ toString t.object ++ toString " ."

                  String
                  Equations
